creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #22)
Thanks for fixing these, Wen, but could the rest just be one or two commits? There are 19 people CC'd here being spammed by Bugzilla and the commit-hook pollutes discussion in the web interface (which I tried to convey in comment #12). I realize this comment isn't helping on that front, either.

I'm currently up to net/py-libdnet and I'll have more time over the next few days to investigate potential fallout of dependencies of non-leaf ports.
